official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official empty Play clientbound update_advancements body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns update_advancements to packet id 0x82.
The generated fixture uses reset=false, showAdvancements=false, and empty added/removed/progress collections.
The official body writes reset boolean, three zero collection/map counts, and showAdvancements boolean.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded booleans, decoded counts, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove advancement tree, progress, UI, or client-load behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer non-empty advancement holder/progress payloads, advancement UI, or client-load behavior.
